blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The available live dataset contains 650 mods rather than a near-2000-mod real filesystem library. Warm rescan evidence was still recorded (698.8ms, responsive UI), but the contract requires near-2000 real-data evidence before this assertion can pass.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented live host-backed rescan validation guidance, healthy-service reuse on occupied ports, and the temporary profile-name draft technique for dirty-guard checks.

notes: The Task-based user-testing-flow-validator launcher still fails in this environment because it resolves to an invalid custom model name; the parent validator executed both planned validation groups directly.

The live machine exposed only one real profile and a 650-mod real filesystem dataset. That was sufficient for all host UI/correctness assertions and for recording actual timing/log evidence, but not for passing VAL-HOST-PERF-002's near-2000 real-data requirement.

The direct host timing script resolved real Windows paths from the persisted settings: E:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\RimWorld, E:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\workshop\content\294100, and C:\Users\soeur\AppData\LocalLow\Ludeon Studios\RimWorld by Ludeon Studios\Config.
